---
name: Documentation request
about: Report missing, outdated, or unclear documentation
title: "[DOCS] "
labels: "area:docs, priority:low"
assignees: ""
---

## What's missing or unclear?
Describe the gap — a missing setup step, an outdated instruction, an unclear explanation, etc.

## Where should this live?
- [ ] README.md
- [ ] CONTRIBUTING.md
- [ ] Inline code comments
- [ ] Wiki / other (specify):

## Additional context
Links to the relevant file/section if known.
